title: bridge-zephyr: implement standalone LoRa RX processing or remove mode
description: Feature-completeness gap found during Zephyr firmware status audit. The legacy/standalone bridge-zephyr main path supports CONFIG_LICHEN_LORA_L2 without CONFIG_LICHEN_L2, but RX processing is explicitly not implemented. That mode can transmit/be configured enough to look real while dropping inbound radio traffic. Evidence: firmware/bridge-zephyr/src/main.c:58-68 describes standalone LoRa mode, and :78 says RX processing not implemented. Acceptance: either implement the standalone RX path through frame parse, SCHC decompression, and IPv6 injection/logging as appropriate, or remove/disable this configuration path so builds use the full CONFIG_LICHEN_L2 integration instead.
acceptance_criteria: After implementation, run the relevant tests/builds and then complete two separate code-review passes before closing. Each review pass should inspect the produced code against this Bead's acceptance criteria and file follow-up Beads for any discovered issues.
